package.name: FreeCADDigitizer
package.description:
AI Furniture Digitizer — Convert furniture drawing images (PNG/JPEG/PDF) into parametric CAD sketches and shop drawings.
Workflow: 1. Import a furniture drawing image into FreeCAD 2. Generate CAD Sketch — sends image to the CAD engine (OpenCV + OCR + AI) 3. DXF is automatically imported into the active document
Requires the CAD engine running locally (port 8000) or at cad.abcx124.xyz.

workbench.name: AI Furniture Digitizer
workbench.description: Import furniture drawings and generate CAD sketches via the CAD engine API.
